conditional promises
40 Hz of special interest

hypothalamus is extensively interconnected with other brain regions that collectively provide signals that motivate different types of behaviors, with varying levels of urgency. The resultant signals of need may be experienced as hunger, thirst, tiredness, cold, pain, fear, and so on; that is, basic emotions.
plays a role in intentionality?
conditional promises
